tool_constraints.note: All 2026 data in this file provided by user from external web verification; not re-fetched by this agent

confirmed_sources.caveats: Index page confirmed by agent; financial contents provided by user
confirmed_sources.notes: Official SEC filing. Segment sales and operating income extracted by user.

verified_sources.verified_statement: US Prime $14.99/month or $139/year; Prime Video standalone $8.99/month; Student $7.49/month or $69/year
verified_sources.caveats: US pricing only; other regions may differ

verified_sources.claim: AWS annual revenue FY2025 and Q1 2026
verified_sources.verified_statement: FY2025 AWS segment sales $128.725B, operating income $45.606B; Q1 2026 sales $37.6B, YoY +28%, operating income $14.2B
verified_sources.caveats: Segment sales include inter-segment adjustments; not identical to standalone AWS revenue
verified_sources.source_title: Amazon FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 Earnings Release
verified_sources.notes: From Amazon official 10-K and quarterly earnings release.

verified_sources.verified_statement: Amazon launched Supply Chain Services opening logistics network to all businesses
verified_sources.caveats: Service newly launched; adoption rates TBD
verified_sources.source_title: Amazon Supply Chain Services for Business
verified_sources.extracted_value: Supply Chain Services open to all businesses
verified_sources.notes: Amazon official press release and Business Wire.

verified_qualified_sources.verified_statement: Amazon official: independent sellers account for more than 60% of sales; Marketplace Pulse estimates 60% paid units, ~69% GMV in Q1 2026
verified_qualified_sources.caveats: Amazon 'sales' undefined; paid units, GMV, and services revenue ($172.162B) are different metrics
verified_qualified_sources.source_title: Amazon 2025 Small Business Empowerment Report; Marketplace Pulse
verified_qualified_sources.extracted_value: 60%+ sales (official); 60% paid units / ~69% GMV (Marketplace Pulse estimate)
verified_qualified_sources.notes: Mix of official and third-party estimate. Must distinguish metrics.

verified_qualified_sources.verified_statement: Amazon 2025 delivered 6.7B packages, exceeding USPS 6.6B, UPS 4.4B, FedEx 3.6B by volume
verified_qualified_sources.caveats: Volume-based only; UPS/FedEx still lead by revenue; data is ShipMatrix estimate
verified_qualified_sources.source_title: Pitney Bowes Parcel Shipping Index 2024; ShipMatrix / Supply Chain Dive 2025
verified_qualified_sources.notes: ShipMatrix is a recognized supply chain analytics source.

verified_qualified_sources.verified_statement: Revenue groups known: Online stores $269.3B, 3P services $172.2B, Ads $68.6B, Subscription $49.6B, AWS $128.7B. Segment operating income: NA $29.6B, International $4.8B, AWS $45.6B
verified_qualified_sources.caveats: Cannot precisely break down e-commerce profit by membership vs sales vs ads vs 3P from public filings
verified_qualified_sources.extracted_value: Revenue groups and segment operating income disclosed
verified_qualified_sources.notes: High confidence on revenue figures; profit allocation across e-commerce sub-components is not disclosed.

partially_verified_sources.verified_statement: Last official global disclosure: 200M+ in 2021. CIRP estimates 201M US shoppers with Prime in Q1 2026
partially_verified_sources.caveats: Global official data outdated (2021); CIRP is third-party estimate; 'shoppers' includes multiple household members, not paid accounts
partially_verified_sources.source_title: Amazon 2021 Shareholder Letter; CIRP Prime Membership Saturation Report
partially_verified_sources.extracted_value: 200M+ global (2021 official); 201M US shoppers (2026 CIRP estimate)
partially_verified_sources.notes: Significant metric mismatch: global vs US, memberships vs shoppers.

partially_verified_sources.verified_statement: Mordor Intelligence: Alexa 36.12% smart speaker market 2025. CIRP/GeekWire: Echo ~75% US smart speaker share. Amazon: ~600M Alexa-powered devices globally
partially_verified_sources.caveats: Three different metrics not comparable: global smart speaker market share vs US Echo speaker share vs Alexa-powered device installed base (includes third-party hardware)
partially_verified_sources.source_title: Mordor Intelligence Smart Speaker Market Report; GeekWire/CIRP; Amazon Official
partially_verified_sources.notes: High risk of conflating three different numbers. Must be clearly separated in any wiki entry.

partially_verified_sources.verified_statement: Red Stag estimates ~82% active sellers use FBA; Helium 10 estimates 86% active sellers use FBA, 82% prefer it
partially_verified_sources.caveats: Third-party estimates, not Amazon official disclosure; 'active seller' definitions may vary across sources
partially_verified_sources.notes: Range across two industry sources. Not official.
